title: memory_item
description: A sanitized, retrievable unit of prior knowledge for the E-track memory layer. Retrieval is a SENSOR (returns priors), never a judge: a memory_item carries no verdict field and may not authorize a candidate, confirm a finding, or mutate Plane 1. It indexes only post-redaction text (casebooks, field notes, public research). See docs/post-phase14-capability-fit-review.md and the E-track plan.

sanitized_text.description: post-redaction excerpt only; never raw secrets

provenance.description: where it came from (abstract handle, not a client name)

allowed_planes.description: memory is a Plane-3/4 substrate; it may NOT write Plane-1
